meaning: n.閲嶆柊瀹氫环(甯告寚娑ㄤ环)
examples: That should in theory reduce the risk of a rapid repricing of assets.
Even if stability returns to markets, the repricing of risk is likely to continue.
So far, though, the financial wobbles, however unnerving, look like a healthy repricing of risk.
Well, now the repricing is at hand, and it is not going to be fun.
If successful, Husky will be the first issuer to have a first-lien repricing since Gibson Energy in May.
